process.stdout:
examples/simple-linear.dot: Simple Linear Workflow
  A minimal starter flow that plans a small change, executes it, and summarizes the outcome.
software-development/implement-change-request.dot: Implement Change Request
  Read an approved change request from changes/<CR-id>/request.md, keep runtime state under .spark/change-requests/<CR-id>/, implement the required work, evaluate completion against the durable request, and write changes/<CR-id>/result.md when the repository is ready.
software-development/spec-implementation/implement-spec.dot: Implement Spec Program
  A greenfield software-development program flow. It creates committed spec packages under specs/<slug>/, stores workflow state under .spark/spec-implementation/<slug>/, refreshes .spark/spec-implementation/current/ as a stable runtime alias to the active workspace, surfaces the committed spec package through current/spec/, extracts a requirement ledger, proposes an architecture, plans milestones, dispatches a milestone worker as a child flow, and audits conformance until the specification is covered or the effort is blocked.
